title: parthenium confertum var. lyratum
intro: Parthenium confertum var. lyratum, also known as Lian Qiao, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to China. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which make it beneficial for treating a range of health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and supporting immune function. Lian Qiao can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
